purpose: Comprehensive game-card header coverage for Today’s Card / future Slate.
notes: This registry may be broader than the leagues currently visible on Today’s Card.
Every sport and league in data/sports-card-config.json must also exist here.
Adding a new Slate sport or league without header coverage is a validation error.
MMA and boxing share the top-level Combat Sports folder.

leagues.label: Premier League of Bosnia and Herzegovina
